title: rubus hirtus f. aciculatus
intro: Rubus hirtus f. aciculatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry vine, is a species of bramble native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus f. aciculatus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate its health benefits.
